interactions.raw_notes: Devon saw Eric Glyman on a panel about the future of corporate cards. Caught him briefly post-panel — Eric remembered Devon from the Paribus days. Said they were 'mostly buttoned up' on Series C but happy to chat.

interactions.subject: Catching up — Renegade x Ramp
interactions.raw_notes: Eric sent a courtesy update post Series C. Mentioned focus on bill pay product. Devon replied congratulating. No follow-on diligence — round was already closed and pre-empted.

interactions.author: devon@renegade.vc
interactions.raw_notes: Internal: Ramp Series D announced at $13B. Horizontal SaaS — not a thesis fit for Renegade (we focus on workflow-critical vertical infra and dual-use industrials). Tracking as a benchmark for fintech multiples but not a target.

interactions.author: maya@renegade.vc
interactions.raw_notes: Internal: Ramp AI agents launch is interesting as a data point on agent commercialization in finance workflows. Adding to competitive-landscape doc for our agent-platform thesis but Ramp itself remains a pass on thesis-fit grounds.
